title: ASR Outdoor 5 Inch Portable Aluminum Waterproof EDC Storage Container, Silver
description:
Whether traveling, backpacking, camping, hiking, boating and more, a secure, ultra lightweight and waterproof storage container is an essential item to keep valuables safe, dry and protected from any impending damage. Medication, money, matches, first aid supplies, jewelry or keys is just the shortlist of personal items or gear that could be stored in this EDC waterproof capsule. Featuring a built in rubber O-ring seal, this travel accessories or camping essentials storage container is as mentioned, waterproof, keeping important contents dry and free of moisture, even if fully submerged in water. The storage container capsule also comes with built in carabiner clip and key chain, providing versatile bag, luggage or backpack or on person attachment options

ASR Outdoor 5 Inch Portable Aluminum Waterproof EDC Storage Container, Silver

Whether traveling, backpacking, camping, hiking, boating and more, a secure, ultra lightweight and waterproof storage container is an essential item to keep valuables safe, dry and protected from any impending damage. Medication, money, matches, first aid supplies, jewelry or keys is just the shortlist of personal items or gear that could be stored in this EDC waterproof capsule.

Featuring a built in rubber O-ring seal, this travel accessories or camping essentials storage container is as mentioned, waterproof, keeping important contents dry and free of moisture, even if fully submerged in water. The storage container capsule also comes with built in carabiner clip and key chain, providing versatile bag, luggage or backpack or on person attachment options. The lightweight but durable aluminum alloy material construction means the travel container will add virtually no weight to carry on or travel bags.

Key Features

  • STORAGE CONTAINERS: Made from lightweight aluminum, this airtight screw top waterproof storage container with rubber seal from ASR Outdoor keeps important and valuable items dry, secure and protected, whether for camping, backpacking, hiking, travel and more
  • CAMPING ESSENTIALS: Ideal to keep valuable items dry and protected when backpacking, biking, skiing or snowboarding, boating and more; suitable for bug out bags, emergency preparedness items, natural disaster survival kits and prepper supplies to keep valuables organized, safe and moisture free
  • TRAVEL ACCESSORIES: A great travel essentials item, securely pack and store money, medication, keys, first aid supplies, jewelry and more in these waterproof storage containers; lightweight aluminum design will add virtually no weight to carry on or travel bags
  • CARABINER CLIP KEY CHAIN: Aluminum screw top waterproof storage containers come with built in carabiner clip and key chain for versatile bag, backpack or on person attachment
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 5.0 x 1.5 inches; Weight: 0.22lbs; Colors: Black or Silver

Product Specifications

  • MPN: C9VRKXYB
  • UPC: 810131705480
  • Color: Silver
  • Size: Medium

While we take these camping or hiking most regularly, they could also be suitable for following applications: travel, boating, natural disaster survival kit, with survival gear, biking, skiing or snowboarding, cycling, backpacking, with emergency preparedness items, bug out bags, prepper supplies, EDC gear and more.

Keep valuables organized, safe and moisture free with ASR Outdoors aluminum storage container capsules with carabiner clips, available in black or silver colorways.

Dimensions: 5.0 x 1.5 inches
